name: ChandanKumar
summary: Data Scientist with production experience in NLP, deep learning, LLMs, and time-series forecasting. IIT Kharagpur alumnus skilled in feature engineering, statistical modeling, and generative AI. Delivered a demand forecasting engine achieving 95% Recall on surge detection, enterprise NLP pipelines reducing manual processing by 30%, and RAG systems with 92%+ answer faithfulness.

experience.title: Data Science Intern
experience.description: Developed TensorFlow document classification model achieving 90%+ accuracy on unstructured enterprise datasets, reducing manual review time by 30% across client workflows. Engineered enterprise Agentic RAG system for regulatory compliance Q&A using LLMs and vector retrieval; reduced average query response time by 40% in production. Automated end-to-end ML pipelines (labeling, training, inference) with MLflow tracking, improving workflow scalability and deployment repeatability.

experience.title: AI Developer Intern
experience.description: Built spaCy and Transformer-based NLP pipelines to extract and summarize stakeholder insights from financial reports; implemented sentiment analysis and topic modeling with real-time audience engagement metrics.
